steps.title: Identify what we need to find
steps.content: We need to express $c - b$ in terms of $t$. We're given that $9t + b = c$.

steps.title: Solve for c - b
steps.content:
Starting with $9t + b = c$, subtract $b$ from both sides:
$$9t + b - b = c - b$$
$$9t = c - b$$
Therefore $c - b = 9t$. That confirms D is correct.
